title: Galindas Exports

'''Galindas Exports''' was one of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate's]] mass-market fencing and money laundering operations.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

Galindas maintained a large processing network in the [[Skine sector/Legends|Sektor]].<ref name="guide" />

A number of asteroid storage facilities, near [[Lucrenn]], were maintained by Galindas Exports.

It maintained a branch office at the [[Vergesso Base]], which was controlled by [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo]] (another Tenloss subordinate).<ref name="guide" />

Galindas was a big supplier of materiel and equipment for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], either directly, or through Ororo or independent [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]; Vergesso was a location where hundreds of [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] passed to the Alliance each [[standard month/Legends|month]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="guide" />

{{Company-stub}}
